message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #F6F1D6
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #A9D7F5
  ParticipantBorderColor #4A90B8
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #A9D7F5
  BoxBorderColor #000000
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4
  NoteBorderColor #000000
}

actor nsq

participant "GuideTaskCrmVisitAssignListener" as L
participant "guideTaskCrmVisitAssignProcessor" as P
participant "GuideTaskAssignDomainService" as DS
participant "ShoppingGuideReadApi" as SRA
participant "GuideTaskDepartmentAssignStrategy" as STR
participant "GuideTaskAssignFactory" as F
participant "GuideTaskAssignRepository" as AR
participant "GuideTaskRepository" as GR
participant "NsqProducer" as NP

nsq -> L : 1 下发任务
activate L
L -> P : 2 开始处理
activate P
P -> DS : 3 任务分配
activate DS

note over DS
下发给所有部门
end note

DS -> SRA : 4 查询下发对象 department
activate SRA
SRA --> DS
deactivate SRA

DS -> STR : 5 分配任务
activate STR

note over STR
只有任务下发给导购的时候\n才创建导购的任务明细
end note

STR -> F : 6 创建分配的任务实体
activate F
F --> STR
deactivate F

group Transaction
  DS -> AR : 7 保存分配状态 status_flow 任务流转至 分配完成
  activate AR
  AR --> DS
  deactivate AR

  DS -> GR : 8 保存分配状态 status_flow 任务流转至 待启动
  activate GR
  GR --> DS
  deactivate GR
end

DS -> NP : 9 发送下发完成消息，准备启动任务
activate NP
NP --> DS
deactivate NP

deactivate STR
deactivate DS
deactivate P
deactivate L
@enduml
